examples: The fact that even larvae are luminescent lends support to this theory.
The final result just looks cool...like some strange bio-luminescent space organisms.
“Ajax” is a waterfall of red, framed by strips of luminescent blue and wider areas of pink and purple.
To the south, on Stocking Island, luminescent red starfish grow to over a foot in diameter.
However, this new study revealed that the shark is also luminescent on its top side.
